headline: T-Mobile’s Customer Machine vs. Vodafone’s Restructuring Gamble vs. SK Telecom’s Surprise Rally: One Clear Winner Emerges
summary: T-Mobile US (NASDAQ: TMUS), Vodafone (NASDAQ: VOD), and SK Telecom (NYSE: SKM) occupy the same sector but run three completely different businesses in three different competitive environments. With fresh earnings for two of them and a surging stock price for the third, now is a good moment to compare how each stacks up. T-Mobile Keeps ... T-Mobile’s Customer Machine vs. Vodafone’s Restructuring Gamble vs. SK Telecom’s Surprise Rally: One Clear Winner Emerges
